creator: drs-freebsd@sieborger.nom.za
text:
This bug still affects 10.3-RELEASE and it's being triggered on a number of our machines during backups.  Any chance of merging the fix to that branch in an errata notification?

FreeBSD XXXXXX 10.3-RELEASE-p11 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p11 #0: Mon Oct 24 18:49:24 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

panic: vputx: negative ref cnt
